DISCOVERY 612, NOTICE AND MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWER TO POST-JUDGMENT DISCOVERY AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS - NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO POST-JUDGMENT DISCOVERY IS GRANTED. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED AGAINST DEFENDANT IN THE AMOUNT OF $340, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED. calendar.matters:
Notice And Motion To Compel Answer To Post-Judgment Discovery And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-05-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc.'s Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $340, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
